executives.name: Darren Hall
executives.background: Mr. Hall has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously Chief Operating Officer of Kirkland Lake Gold and has held senior roles at Newmont Mining Corporation.

executives.name: David Splett
executives.background: Mr. Splett has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as CFO for Latin America at Goldcorp and has held senior financial roles at Teck Resources.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Petros Williams
executives.background: Mr. Williams has over 20 years of experience in mining operations and engineering. He previously held senior operational roles at Kirkland Lake Gold and Newmont.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

board_of_directors.name: Blayne Johnson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Johnson has over 30 years of experience in the capital markets and mining sector. He was a founder of Newmarket Gold and has been involved in numerous successful mining ventures.

board_of_directors.name: Darren Hall
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hall is the President and CEO of Calibre Mining Corp. and has extensive operational experience in the gold mining sector.
committees: Health, Safety, Environmental and Sustainability Committee

board_of_directors.name: Douglas Forster
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Forster has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He was the President and CEO of Newmarket Gold and has served on several public company boards.

board_of_directors.name: Edward Farrauto
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Farrauto has over 30 years of experience as a senior financial executive in the mining industry, including roles as CFO for several public companies.

board_of_directors.name: Audra Walsh
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Walsh is a professional engineer with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She has held executive roles at Minas de Aguas Teñidas and Newmont.
committees: Health, Safety, Environmental and Sustainability Committee (Chair)

board_of_directors.name: Raymond Threlkeld
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Threlkeld has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the President and CEO of Rainy River Resources and held senior roles at Barrick Gold.
committees: Health, Safety, Environmental and Sustainability Committee

sources.source_description: Annual Information Form for the year ended December 31, 2023
